revenue_configuration_review.scope: Uniform trained-vs-baseline revenue blend over the primary 30-day holdout

evidence.selection_metric: lowest RMSE, then MAE, then MAPE

revenue_configuration_review.interpretation: This is a review of the existing diagnostic blend sweep, not a newly shipped ensemble path. The single final holdout prefers a lower uniform revenue blend, but this is only one market window. ForecastIQ keeps the current horizon gate because the pooled paired-bootstrap evidence favors the trained 30-day signal and shows parity, not regression, at longer revenue horizons.

revenue_configuration_review.scope: Retune per-horizon revenue gate using rolling-origin paired-bootstrap verdicts

evidence.decision_rule: Use trained residual correction only when the paired-bootstrap interval favors trained model; use the seasonal baseline anchor when the verdict is a statistical tie or safe-baseline win.

revenue_configuration_review.interpretation: This reviews the round-2 bootstrap verdicts rather than a new feature experiment. Revenue bootstrap verdicts were 30d=trained_model, 60d=statistical_tie, 90d=statistical_tie. This supports keeping trained influence at 30 days and baseline anchoring at 60/90 days rather than forcing residual correction where the statistical evidence is a tie.

model_path_consistency.interpretation: The live app and offline evaluator are directionally reconciled but not point-identical; the UI surfaces a 15% planning-confidence badge so users understand the bounded model-path spread.

recommendation: Candidate revenue_model_weight=0.00 scored best on holdout RMSE. Review before updating the packaged artifact. Keep roas_model_weight=0.60; it has the best ROAS RMSE/MAE balance.
